title: Top 15 High-Priority Indexing Targets — Phase 21.1
selection_method: URL Inspection API verified coverage states. 15 URLs checked: 7 indexed (0 imp), 3 discovered-NI, 4 unknown-to-Google, 1 already indexed.

targets.why: Mortgage calculator guide — directly supports the most valuable calculator. Google discovered it but hasn't indexed it. Add internal links from mortgage-calculator to trigger indexing.
targets.fix_plan: Add content: real example, step-by-step. Add internal links from mortgage-calculator, mortgage-affordability, and mortgage blogs.

targets.why: Compound interest guide — high-value topic. Discovered but not indexed.
targets.fix_plan: Add real compound example. Internal links from compound-interest calculator and investment blogs.

targets.why: Retirement planning guide — evergreen high-value topic.
targets.fix_plan: Add retirement scenario example. Internal links from retirement-planning and 401k calculator.

targets.why: Core calculator — simple interest is a fundamental financial concept. Google doesn't know this page exists.
targets.fix_plan: Verify in sitemap. Add internal links from compound-interest. Add FAQ. Request indexing via GSC UI.

targets.why: Capital gains tax — high-value tax topic. Unknown to Google.
targets.fix_plan: Verify in sitemap. Add internal links from tax-calculator. Add FAQ.

targets.why: Mortgage comparison — directly supports mortgage-calculator. Unknown to Google.
targets.fix_plan: Verify in sitemap. Internal links from mortgage-calculator and mortgage blogs.

targets.why: IRA comparison — high-value retirement topic. Unknown to Google.
targets.fix_plan: Verify in sitemap. Internal links from retirement-planning and 401k calculator.

targets.why: MOST IMPORTANT calculator. Indexed but 0 impressions — severe ranking/content/authority problem. Thin tool variants (mortgage-900k, mortgage-200k) are ranking instead at pos 3.0 and 6.6.
targets.fix_plan: Improve content: FAQ, short answer, unique intro. Strengthen internal links. Suppress thin variant rankings via parent CTA strategy (done).

targets.why: Core loan calculator. Indexed but 0 impressions. Thin variants (loan-3k, loan-30k) are ranking instead.
targets.fix_plan: Same as mortgage — improve content, FAQ, internal links.

targets.why: Tax bracket decision page. Indexed but 0 impressions. High-value tax topic.
targets.fix_plan: Improve content. Internal links from tax-calculator.

targets.why: Mortgage refinance decision. Indexed but 0 impressions.
targets.fix_plan: Improve content. Internal links from mortgage-calculator.

targets.why: 401k decision — high-value retirement topic. Indexed but no impressions.
Investment account comparison. Indexed but no impressions.
Student loans vs investing decision. Unique content.
targets.fix_plan: Internal links from investment-return and pay-off-debt-or-invest.

targets.why: Retirement withdrawal calculator. Indexed but 0 impressions.
